transcript.text: I'm an automated medical assistant. If this is an emergency, hang up and call 911. Do you consent to continue? (yes/no)
What is your main medical concern today?
I have a rash on both of my arms.
When did you first notice the rash on your arms?
I know. Maybe a days ago.
Can you describe what the rash looks like and if it is itchy, painful, or has any other symptoms?
The rash goes from my wrist to my 4 forearm to my elbow, actually, on both arms.
Any fever, chills, or feeling unwell since the rash appeared?
And it's red and bumpy and it's also I was still talking. I was still talking.
Is the rash itchy or painful?
